text:
Created attachment 231835
Update to 10.3.34

Update to version MariaDB 10.3.34.
 - Changelog: https://mariadb.com/kb/en/mariadb-10334-release-notes/
   - Changelog 10.3.33 (which has been revoked): https://mariadb.com/kb/en/mariadb-10333-release-notes/
 - Regenerate broken patches
 - This release contains security fixes for multiple CVE's
